description: Create migration adding `inbound_webhooks` table (Citus-distributed by tenant, composite PK including tenant)
Create migration adding `inbound_webhook_deliveries` table (Citus-distributed by tenant)

Reserved-integration-type registry/check so user webhook slugs cannot collide with bundled integrations' `tenant_external_entity_mappings.integration_type` values (ninjaone, tactical_rmm, tanium, xero, qbo, entra, etc.)
Helper `lookupAlgaEntityByExternalId(tenant, webhookSlug, entityType, externalId)` queries `tenant_external_entity_mappings` (no new entity columns)
Helper `writeEntityMapping(tenant, webhookSlug, entityType, algaId, externalId, realm?)` for create-actions to register mappings
Add `inbound_webhook` permission resource and seed for admin role
Add PostHog feature flag `inbound_webhooks_enabled`
TypeScript types: `InboundWebhookConfig`, `InboundWebhookDelivery`, `AuthConfig` union, `HandlerConfig` union
Zod schemas for inbound webhook upsert input (per auth_type and handler_type)
Server action `listInboundWebhooks` (withAuth, tenant-scoped)
Server action `getInboundWebhook(id)`
Server action `upsertInboundWebhook(input)` — slug uniqueness check per tenant
Server action `deleteInboundWebhook(id)`
Server action `rotateInboundWebhookSecret(id)` (writes new secret to vault, returns once)
Server action `setInboundWebhookActiveState(id, active)`
Server action `listInboundDeliveries(filter, page)`
Server action `getInboundDelivery(id)`
Server action `replayInboundDelivery(id)` — re-dispatches against current config, links new row
Server action `captureSamplePayload(id)` (toggles capture mode for 5 min)
Server action `clearSamplePayload(id)`
Server action `sendInboundWebhookTest(id, body, headers)` (synthetic in-process dispatch)
Inbound HTTP route handler at `/api/inbound/[tenantSlug]/[webhookSlug]` (POST/PUT/PATCH)
Tenant slug → tenant resolver with caching
Webhook slug → config lookup (per-tenant, indexed)
Auth verifier: HMAC-SHA256 (configurable header), timing-safe compare
Auth verifier: Bearer token, timing-safe compare
Auth verifier: IP allowlist (CIDR matching)
Auth verifier: Shared-secret-in-path token
Unified 401 response for unknown slug + bad auth (no enumeration)
Idempotency key extractor: header source
Idempotency key extractor: JSONata expression on body
Dedup lookup within configurable window; return 200 no-op for duplicates
Delivery row persisted before dispatch (so failures are visible)
Per-webhook rate limiter (Redis token bucket, default 600/min)
Header filtering on persistence (strip Cookie/Authorization)
Sample payload capture: first verified body within active capture window saved to config
Action registry core: `registerAction(def)`, `listActions()`, `getAction(name)` at `server/src/lib/inboundWebhooks/actions/registry.ts`
Action definition type: `{ name, entityType, displayName, description, targetFields[], handle() }`
Target field schema type: `{ name, type, required, description, enumValues? }`
Bootstrap import of all package-contributed inbound action registrations on server start
Field mapping evaluator: runs JSONata against request body per target field
Mapping validation errors recorded as failed delivery with clear error
Lookup-miss in `*ByExternalId` actions returns failed delivery (not silent no-op)
Ticket action: `createTicket` (registered in `packages/tickets/src/actions/inboundActions.ts`)
Ticket action: `updateTicketByExternalId` (status, priority, assignment, board)
Ticket action: `addTicketCommentByExternalId`
Ticket action: `changeTicketStatusByExternalId`
Client action: `upsertClientByExternalId`
Client action: `setClientActiveByExternalId`
Contact action: `upsertContactByExternalId` (uses `client_users` table)
Asset action: `upsertAssetByExternalId` — delegates to `ingestNormalizedRmmDeviceSnapshot` when payload is RMM-shaped
Asset action: plain (non-RMM) asset upsert path for generic asset payloads
Invoice action: `markInvoicePaidByExternalId`
Invoice action: `updateInvoiceStatusByExternalId`
Invoice action: idempotent mark-paid (no double-mark on already-paid invoice)
Time entry action: `createTimeEntry`
Project task action: `createProjectTask`
Project task action: `updateProjectTaskStatusByExternalId`
Cross-cutting action: `addTagToEntityByExternalId` (accepts target entity_type + external_id + tag value)
Workflow handler dispatcher: starts a workflow run with the normalized envelope
Envelope builder: `{source, body, headers, verified, delivery_id, idempotency_key, received_at}`
Delivery row links to workflow_run_id once started
Workflow trigger failure (engine error) recorded on delivery; subsequent workflow run failures do NOT mark delivery failed
Webhook payload context adapter for expression editor (`webhookPayloadContextAdapter.ts`)
Adapter introspects captured sample payload to build path tree
Reuse `ExpressionTextArea` from workflow designer for field mapping inputs
Settings page refactor: tabbed `AdminWebhooksSetup` (Inbound | Outbound)
Inbound webhooks list view (table mirrors outbound shape)
Inbound webhook create/edit dialog with Identity section
Auth section: dropdown (HMAC/Bearer/IP/Path) + conditional sub-form
Auth secret one-time-display modal after creation
Idempotency section (key source dropdown + value input)
Handler section conditional rendering: direct_action vs workflow
Direct-action UI: action dropdown populated from registry
Direct-action UI: target field rows with `ExpressionTextArea` per field
Sample payload capture button + status indicator
Sample payload tree side panel (click-to-insert path)
Workflow handler UI: workflow dropdown + envelope info card
Active state toggle + auto-disable indicator
Delivery log list (mirrors outbound's table layout)
Delivery detail drawer (request/response/headers/latency/error)
Replay button on delivery rows
Synthetic test request UI (send custom body/headers from dialog)
All new UI strings via `t('...')` i18n
All interactive elements have kebab-case `id` attributes
Feature flag gate on Settings tab visibility
Feature flag gate on `/api/inbound/*` route (returns 404 when disabled)
Permission check on every server action (`withAuth` + `hasPermission`)
REST API route: `GET /api/v1/inbound-webhooks` (list)
